entity.summary: Native Energi decentralized exchange protocol for automated token exchange, supported by official swap SDKs, smart-contract packages, token-list infrastructure, and a wallet-connected trading application.
entity.notes: Current first-party application endpoint is reachable. Official Energi developer documentation identifies Energiswap as a decentralized protocol for automated token exchange and publishes SDK, smart-contract, token-list, and default-token-list packages for building on and interacting with the exchange. Duplicate Energiswap discovery rows are consolidated into one entity.

evidence.title: Energiswap application
evidence.notes: Current first-party Energiswap application endpoint is reachable and serves the active JavaScript exchange application.

evidence.title: Energi SDK documentation — Energiswap
evidence.notes: Official Energi organization documentation identifies Energiswap as a decentralized protocol for automated token exchange and publishes SDK, smart-contract, token-list, and default-token-list packages for exchange applications.

evidence.title: Energiswap DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: June 2026 DEX candidate corpus identifies Energiswap in the DEX category and provides current registry corroboration; duplicate source rows are consolidated into one HEI entity.
